title: CASE <column> WHEN NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END returns wrong result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(50), nullable_column INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_table (value, nullable_column) VALUES ('test2', NULL);
SELECT id, (CASE WHEN nullable_column IS NULL THEN 'NULL Value' ELSE 'Not NULL' END) AS status FROM test_table;
SELECT id, (CASE WHEN nullable_column IS NULL THEN 'NULL Value' ELSE 'Not NULL' END) AS status FROM test_table;
key_bug_features: CASE WHEN column IS NULL returns incorrect result
